svg.title: Using a prefix sum array to compute subarray sums
svg.desc: Left: nums = [2, -1, 3, -3, 4] maps to its prefix sum array [2, 1, 4, 1, 5]. Middle: example 1 computes the sum of the subarray from L=2 to R=3 (values 3 and -3) as prefix[R] minus prefix[L-1], giving 1 - 1 = 0. Right: example 2 computes the sum of the subarray from L=0 to R=3 (values 2, -1, 3, -3) as prefix[R] minus 0 (since L is 0), giving 1 - 0 = 1.
svg.text: Ex.1: Prefix sum of nums subarray in red
Ex.2: Prefix sum of nums subarray in blue
